nodes.context: Sicilian Mafia family based in Palermo, headed by Francesco Madonia.
Sicilian Mafia faction from Corleone, led by Totò Riina.
Coordinating body of Sicilian Mafia families.
Sicilian Mafia clan, allied with the Madonia clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Already one of Riina's closest allies in all of Sicily, he and the Resuttana family he led strongly supported the Corleonesi during the Second Mafia War in 1981–84.
edges.context: The Resuttana family supported the Corleonesi during the Second Mafia War.

edges.evidence_quote: Nevertheless, they have continued to run the Madonia clan, issuing orders via Di Trapani and exchanging information with the Di Trapani clan, according to investigators.
edges.context: The Madonia clan (Resuttana family) exchanged information with the Di Trapani clan.
